theme.reference: Seek Comfort Solutions spacing, section ratios, white contrast, navy hero/footer bands, orange CTA emphasis

hero.heading: Professional Answering and Virtual Receptionist Support
hero.subheading: Reliable call answering, follow-up, and communication support for service-based businesses.
hero.waveDefinition: WAVE represents Written, Automation & AI, Voice, and Electronic communication support.

panelItems.title: Calls get answered
panelItems.text: Live virtual receptionist support keeps customers from waiting or slipping through gaps.

panelItems.title: Follow-up gets handled
panelItems.text: Customer inquiries, appointment confirmations, and next steps stay organized.

panelItems.title: Systems stay connected
panelItems.text: Phone, email, SMS, and electronic communication can work as one clearer workflow.

services.title: Answering Services
services.text: Professional call answering and message handling that keeps customer interactions managed promptly.

services.title: Virtual Receptionist Services
services.text: Live support for customer inquiries, appointment coordination, call routing, and daily communication.

services.title: AI-Powered Communication Support
services.text: Human-centered automation that improves response time while keeping the experience professional.

cta.heading: Need a reliable communication layer for your business?

form.heading: Tell Wave what kind of communication support your team needs.
form.text: Share a few details and Wave can follow up with the next step.
form.providerMode: Email provider adapter will be wired later.
notes: Ready for future booking, email, CRM, or automation integration.
Content and styling are controlled through the JSON config.

fields.name: message
fields.label: What do you need help with?
fields.placeholder: Tell us about missed calls, follow-up, scheduling, or customer communication needs.

footer.summary: Professional answering service and virtual receptionist solutions for businesses that need responsive, customer-focused communication support.
footer.templateNote: This boiler is reusable for simple service-business websites. Swap content, colors, navigation, fields, and future adapters without rebuilding the layout from scratch.
